name: HTML2PDF.app
description: HTML2PDF.app — REST API converting HTML or URL to PDF with header/footer templates and custom CSS support.

seo.title: HTML2PDF.app — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: HTML2PDF.app: HTML2PDF.app — REST API converting HTML or URL to PDF with header/footer templates and custom CSS support.

when_to_use: Converting HTML or URLs to PDF with header/footer templates
Generating invoices and reports from HTML templates via API
Custom CSS-styled PDF generation for web-based documents
Batch HTML-to-PDF conversion for document generation workflows
Serverless PDF creation from existing web page layouts

pros: Dead-simple REST: URL in, PDF out
cons: No JS-heavy SPA rendering edge cases
Feature set smaller than PDFShift or DocRaptor
review.verdict: Small, sharp HTML-to-PDF API — perfect for side projects, thin for regulated production workloads.
review.best_for: Indie devs and small SaaS rendering invoices, tickets, or receipts from templates.
review.not_for: Regulated industries needing SLAs and audit logs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
